## Description

Describe the change and what problem it solves.

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore (tooling, dependencies)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code runs without errors
- [ ] `python Allen.py` launches the assistant
- [ ] Dependencies listed in `requirements.txt` are up to date
- [ ] No large binary files included
